reference: LEVIN DID NOT CARE TO EAT AND HE WAS NOT SMOKING HE DID NOT WANT TO JOIN HIS OWN FRIENDS THAT IS SERGEY IVANOVITCH STEPAN ARKADYEVITCH SVIAZHSKY AND THE REST BECAUSE VRONSKY IN HIS EQUERRY'S UNIFORM WAS STANDING WITH THEM IN EAGER CONVERSATION
text: Levin did not care to eat, and he was not smoking; he did not want to join his own friends. That is Sergey Ivanovich, Stepan Arkadievich, Svirsky, and the rest—because Vronsky, in his equities uniform, was standing with them in eager conversation.
